message: [swap rejected: target set_04_luna_outerwear_01 is not a listing]
Hey everyone! I've got a pair of And Tan Pants up for trade. Looking to swap for some nice tops or outerwear. Let me know what you have!
Dev, those And Tan Pants look like just what I need. I got a White Top here that checks your box. Let's make this trade happen, partner.
(malformed response)
Waitin' to hear back from Dev on that swap. The iron's hot, let's see if he strikes.

Still holdin' steady. Got a good offer on the table for Dev.
I have a Blue Top (set_04_marcus_tops_01) to trade for your And Tan Pants. Straight one-for-one swap.
Two horses in the race now. Dev's got options—hope he picks the right trail.
Listing a Skirt (set_04_omar_bottoms_01). I am looking to trade for outerwear or tops. If you propose a swap, please provide detailed information about the condition of your item.
Buck, I got a White Top in excellent condition—clean, no stains, no tears, washes up nice. Your Skirt would fit my needs perfectly. Let's swap, fair and square.

Hi everyone! I'm super excited to be here! I've got a gorgeous Red Dress (set_04_raj_dresses_01) up for trade. I'm ideally looking for some fabulous outerwear or some great bottoms. Let's make a deal!
Got two irons in the fire now—waitin' on Dev or Buck to make their call.

Patience is a cowboy's best friend. Still waitin' on those bottoms.
